summary: Iteration 19: Premium Wallet Tab Redesign Testing - All 10 features verified. Bank-digital style design with dark theme (#0B0F1A background) working correctly.
passed_tests: Wallet hero shows credit balance in large green text (R$ 0.50)
Wallet hero shows 'Economia total com iToke: R$ 7.00' badge with trending-up icon
Token card shows token count (15) and outline '+ Comprar' button
Ganhe Indicando section shows Indicar Amigo and Indicar Loja side by side
Referral code (ITOKE18555A) displayed in discrete row with copy icon
Minha Rede shows Nivel 1 (Diretos), Nivel 2, Nivel 3 in clean list with count badges
Historico shows transactions with red (negative) amounts (R$ -2.50, R$ -4.00, etc.)
Indicar Amigo button opens ShareInviteModal with correct content
Other tabs (Ofertas, Meus QR, Ajuda, Perfil) remain unchanged with dark theme

verified_features.feature: Hero section with large green balance
verified_features.verification: Balance R$ 0.50 displayed in large green (#10B981) text with 'Saldo de creditos disponivel' caption
Badge shows 'Economia total com iToke: R$ 7.00' with trending-up icon in green pill
Card shows 'Meus Tokens' with count 15 and outline '+ Comprar' button
Button navigates to /buy-tokens page showing token packages
Indicar Amigo and Indicar Loja buttons displayed side by side with icons
Code ITOKE18555A shown with link and copy icons in subtle row
Shows Nivel 1 (Diretos), Nivel 2, Nivel 3 with colored dots and count badges
Shows 8 transactions with red negative amounts (R$ -2.50, R$ -4.00, etc.)
Modal opens with friend type, shows message preview with referral URL, WhatsApp/Email buttons
Ofertas, Meus QR, Ajuda, Perfil tabs all render correctly with dark theme

design_verification.text_contrast: Good - light text on dark background

critical_code_review_comments: wallet.tsx properly implements bank-digital style with premium dark theme
All data-testid attributes preserved: wallet-hero, wallet-tokens, wallet-referral, wallet-network, buy-tokens-btn, share-friend-btn, share-store-btn
Economia total calculation correctly sums only positive transaction amounts
ShareInviteModal integration working with correct type prop
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 complete. Premium wallet tab redesign fully verified. All 10 features working: (1) Hero with large green balance; (2) Economia total badge; (3) Token card with Comprar button; (4) Comprar navigates to /buy-tokens; (5) Ganhe Indicando with side-by-side buttons; (6) Discrete referral code row; (7) Minha Rede vertical list; (8) Historico with colored amounts; (9) ShareInviteModal opens correctly; (10) Other tabs unchanged. Dark theme (#0B0F1A) with green accents (#10B981) properly implemented.
